title: Creeper Pet Inventory
description: This resource pack remakes the recipe button, turning it into your own "safe" creeper located on a small island of land with a flower and a tree in the inventory!
body:
# Creeper Pet Inventory
This resource pack remakes the recipe button, turning it into your own "safe" creeper. In its normal state he has a simple head animation _(see in gallery)_. If you hover and/or click on him, he will try to explode, but fortunately this will not happen. Right? Also, the creeper himself is located on a small island with a flower and a tree, however, the flower and tree are present only in the player’s inventory; in other menus there is only an island.

### The functionality and appearance of the recipe book itself does not change!

## IMPORTANT!!!
**Keep in mind that the resource pack for versions 1.20 - 1.20.1 has no animated textures, so the creeper is the same in active and passive states. This is due to the mechanics of sprites on versions below 1.20.2, where they work differently. Therefore, if you want to see a full-fledged resource pack design, use it on version 1.20.2 and higher.** _(make sure you are using texture pack version 1.0 and higher)_

### For now there are no plans to downgrade a resource pack for versions below 1.20 or make full release of them, due to technical difficulties. You can use the resource pack for versions 1.20 - 1.20.1 on older versions, but I do not guarantee that the resource pack will work correctly.

**Also, the resource pack is only partially compatible with other resource packs that change the player interface** _(GUI)_**. The creeper will remain instead of the usual recipe button** _(only if this resource pack has a higher priority than others and is installed on the correct version)_**, but the island under it will disappear!**
